differential_diagnoses: Dabrafenib and trametinib-induced systemic adverse reaction (pyrexia/hepatotoxicity)
next_steps: Serum ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, and sCD25 levels to evaluate for HLH
Blood smear for Anaplasma morulae and PCR testing for tickborne pathogens
Magnetic resonance cholangiopancreatography (MRCP) to exclude biliary pathology
Liver biopsy with specialized staining and immunohistochemistry
Corticosteroid therapy consideration if drug-induced systemic inflammatory syndrome is confirmed
